test_results.command: python3 -m pytest repository/tests/kernel repository/tests/stages repository/tests/reasoning repository/tests/interaction repository/tests/presentation repository/tests/layout repository/tests/validators repository/tests/orchestrator repository/tests/compiler repository/tests/workpacks -q

test_results.summary: Local shell has no python executable; python3 is available at /usr/bin/python3.

schema_checks.command: for f in repository/schemas/workpacks/*.json; do python3 -m json.tool "$f" >/dev/null || exit 1; done
